hero.title: Simple, transparent pricing
hero.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Upgrade or downgrade at any time.

plans.name: Pro
plans.description: For growing teams that need more power.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: For large organizations with advanced needs.

items.question: How does the free trial work?
items.answer: You get 14 days of full access to the Pro plan with no credit card required. At the end of your trial you can upgrade or continue on the free plan.

items.question: Can I change my plan at any time?
items.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately and we pro-rate any billing differences.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and PayPal. Enterprise customers can also pay by invoice.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Absolutely. We use AES-256 encryption at rest and TLS 1.3 in transit. We are SOC 2 Type II certified and GDPR compliant.

items.question: Do you offer refunds?
items.answer: We offer a 30-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. Contact our support team and we'll process your refund within 5 business days.
